response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ production experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure embedded environments — core requirements for this role. Their work centers on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web stacks, with only a brief, non-industrial C++ stint at National Instruments over a decade ago. No evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols like MQTT/OPC UA is present.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring.
Excellent communication and workshop-leading abilities in software practices.
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++ experience; no evidence of STL, concurrency, or real-time systems.
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA).
Cloud and IoT exposure is web-centric (AWS, Kubernetes), not industrial on-prem/cloud hybrid systems.
